languages.text: Если какие-либо вести о подкреплении и достигли дворца, дальше заставы они не ушли. Необходимо осмотреть заставу.

traits.locale_text: Если какие-либо вести о подкреплении и достигли дворца, дальше заставы они не ушли. Необходимо осмотреть заставу.

languages.text: If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.
languages.original_text: Если какие-либо вести о подкреплении и достигли дворца, дальше заставы они не ушли. Необходимо осмотреть заставу.

traits.locale_text: If any word of the reinforcements has reached the palace, it did not travel beyond the outpost. The outpost must be examined.
If any word of the reinforcements has reached the palace, it did not travel beyond the outpost. The outpost must be examined.
If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.
If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.

languages.text: Sollten die Verstärkung eine Nachricht an den Palast gesendet haben, kam diese nicht über den Außenposten hinaus. Der Außenposten muss untersucht werden.
languages.original_text: If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.

traits.locale_text: Sollten die Verstärkung eine Nachricht an den Palast gesendet haben, kam diese nicht über den Außenposten hinaus. Der Außenposten muss untersucht werden.

languages.text: Si des informations au sujet de renforts au palais ont été envoyées, elles ne sont pas allées plus loin que l'avant-poste. Il faut mener l'enquête.
languages.original_text: If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.

traits.locale_text: Si des informations au sujet de renforts au palais ont été envoyées, elles ne sont pas allées plus loin que l'avant-poste. Il faut mener l'enquête.

languages.text: 就算援军有往宫殿送消息，那也没能越过前哨。必须调查前哨。
languages.original_text: If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.

traits.locale_text: 就算援军有往宫殿送消息，那也没能越过前哨。必须调查前哨。

languages.text: Si se envió a palacio alguna noticia sobre estos refuerzos, desde luego no pasó del puesto avanzado. Es necesario investigarlo.
languages.original_text: If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.

traits.locale_text: Si se envió a palacio alguna noticia sobre estos refuerzos, desde luego no pasó del puesto avanzado. Es necesario investigarlo.

languages.text: もし援軍の知らせが宮殿に届いたとしても、前哨基地の向こうには伝わっていないはずだ。前哨地を視察する必要がある
languages.original_text: If any news of reinforcements has reached the palace, it has not travelled beyond the outpost. We need to inspect the outpost.

languages.text: Takviyelerle ilgili saraya haber gönderildiyse bile karakolun ötesine geçmedi. Karakol araştırılmalı.
languages.original_text: If any word of the reinforcements was sent to the palace, it did not go beyond the outpost. The outpost must be investigated.

traits.locale_text: Takviyelerle ilgili saraya haber gönderildiyse bile karakolun ötesine geçmedi. Karakol araştırılmalı.
